<!-- authority-sha256: ee325b022d124c865776a76d77c0332ec14d06a53dd391fd4379fbd1afabfc32 -->
# Repository Commands

- `pnpm dev`: `turbo run dev --filter=@support/web`
- `pnpm build`: `turbo run build`
- `pnpm build:affected`: `turbo run build --affected`
- `pnpm start`: `pnpm --filter @support/web start`
- `pnpm lint`: `pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint`
- `pnpm lint:root`: `eslint scripts .codex/hooks eslint.config.mjs --max-warnings=0`
- `pnpm typecheck`: `turbo run typecheck`
- `pnpm architecture`: `node scripts/check-architecture.mjs --profile=required`
- `pnpm governance`: `node scripts/check-architecture.mjs --profile=all`
- `pnpm governance:generated`: `node scripts/check-architecture.mjs --profile=generated`
- `pnpm governance:knowledge`: `node scripts/check-architecture.mjs --profile=knowledge`
- `pnpm architecture:contexts`: `node scripts/scaffold-context-readmes.mjs`
- `pnpm architecture:docs`: `node scripts/generate-module-map.mjs`
- `pnpm serena:memories`: `node scripts/generate-serena-memories.mjs`
- `pnpm memory:activate`: `node scripts/memory/cli.mjs activate`
- `pnpm memory:checkpoint`: `node scripts/memory/cli.mjs checkpoint`
- `pnpm memory:distill`: `node scripts/memory/cli.mjs distill`
- `pnpm memory:validate`: `node scripts/memory/cli.mjs validate`
- `pnpm memory:maintain`: `node scripts/memory/cli.mjs maintain`
- `pnpm memory:migrate`: `node scripts/memory/cli.mjs migrate`
- `pnpm memory:status`: `node scripts/memory/cli.mjs status`
- `pnpm test`: `pnpm run test:architecture && turbo run test`
- `pnpm test:architecture`: `vitest run --config vitest.config.ts`
- `pnpm test:memory`: `node --test scripts/memory/schema.test.mjs scripts/memory/render.test.mjs scripts/memory/storage.test.mjs scripts/memory/engine.test.mjs .codex/hooks/repository-guard.test.mjs .codex/hooks/memory-orchestrator.test.mjs`
- `pnpm test:e2e`: `turbo run test:e2e --filter=@support/web`
- `pnpm test:e2e:affected`: `turbo run test:e2e --filter=@support/web --affected`
- `pnpm ci:quality`: `pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint typecheck test`
- `pnpm ci:quality:affected`: `pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint typecheck test --affected`
- `pnpm check:architecture`: `pnpm run architecture && pnpm run governance:generated && pnpm run test:architecture && pnpm run test:memory`
- `pnpm check`: `pnpm run check:architecture && pnpm run ci:quality`
- `pnpm check:full`: `pnpm run check:architecture && pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint typecheck test build test:e2e`
- `pnpm check:affected`: `pnpm run check:architecture && pnpm run ci:quality:affected`
- `pnpm check:full:affected`: `pnpm run check:architecture && pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint typecheck test build test:e2e --affected`
- `pnpm turbo:dry-run`: `turbo run lint typecheck test build test:e2e --dry-run`
